⚙️ SETTINGS
Configure Agent Office preferences and manage local data.
Theme
Choose a color theme. Saved to this browser's localStorage.
Gateway URLs
Set custom gateway endpoints. Saved to this browser's localStorage.
Saved.
Local Data
All data is stored in this browser's localStorage. Nothing is sent to any server.
Reset Countdowns
Clears all API reset countdown cards
Memory Entries
Clears all saved agent memory entries
Nav Layout
Resets sidebar collapsed/expanded state
All Local Data
Wipes everything stored by this app
About
Agent Office — AI agent management dashboard
All data is local. No telemetry. No account required.
